description_long: This is a single-story modern bungalow with a flat roof and a rectangular footprint, featuring a combination of white and gray exterior walls. The front yard includes a small green lawn, a tree, and a paved driveway leading to an attached garage. The property is enclosed by a mix of wooden and metal fencing, with landscaped garden beds and shrubs along the perimeter. Large windows and sliding glass doors provide ample natural light to the interior spaces, and the backyard offers additional green space with another tree. The layout includes multiple rooms, visible through the open roof design, and the main entrance is accentuated by a small porch area. The overall design emphasizes clean lines, open spaces, and a blend of hardscape and softscape elements.
description: A modern, single-story bungalow with a flat roof, white and gray exterior, attached garage, landscaped front and back yards, and large windows.
description_view_0: Front view showing the driveway, garage, main entrance, front lawn, and a tree with a partial view of the interior layout.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the long, flat exterior wall, backyard fencing, and a glimpse of the rear garden and interior rooms.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the backyard, wooden fencing, garden beds, and the back entrances with visible interior spaces.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the side yard, additional fencing, and the open backyard with a tree and green space.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical with large grouped windows and sliding glass doors
